sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: easy to centre a meal around because practical meal value matters. gives a straightforward protein solution because the category often wins on simplicity and reliability. complete protein delivery is reliable because the category is supposed to do this well.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: the outcome depends heavily on preparation because a good raw profile can still be cooked into a worse result. fat quality can go sideways fast because some meats are strong until the fat profile shows up. cost and storage can be a pain because practical downsides still count.
